name: a recommendation carries a grounded flag and a rationale citing the fitness it stood on
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/recommend-technology.sh" --umbrella frontend --need enterprise 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'r=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(r["grounded"]==true && r["rationale"].to_s.length>10 ? 0:1)' && echo recommendation-grounded 1>&2
